1.0.0.en: Initial release: Volt Time Cloud API integration with charger monitoring, start/stop charging, current limit control, Homey Energy support, and 17 flow cards.
1.0.0.nl: Eerste release: Volt Time Cloud API-integratie met ladermonitoring, starten/stoppen van laden, stroomlimiet-regeling, Homey Energy-ondersteuning en 17 flow-kaarten.
